review_coverage.notes: Exhaustive source-first review covered the scoped steering snapshot/export surface, the prior blocking themes, the preserved assistant/media-disabled selftest evidence, and a local rerun of new/verification/tests/run_steering_media_selftest.sh. The runtime-owned steering snapshot now carries the accepted fields to control.steering_snapshot on the project-owned non-assistant surface, including vetoed steering snapshots, and the checkpoint now preserves assistant-disabled proof via the focused selftest source plus passing log artifact.
